## Problem

What can't you do today, or what's painful?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. Mention any CLI command/flag or `config/*.yml` key it
would add or change (these need matching docs — see CLAUDE.md).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed.

## Area / label

One of: `security`, `ux`, `graph`, `governance`, `performance`.
